  • 概览
  • 程序包
  • 类
  • 树
  • 索引
  • 帮助
SEARCH

所有类和接口

类
说明
Account
The type Account used to saving money and transaction.
AccountBillInfo
use to kill an object and remove it from the filesystem
AccountInfoReader
The AccountInfoReader class implements the LoginCheck interface and is responsible for reading and managing account information from a structured file system.
AccountInfoWriter
The AccountInfoWriter class is responsible for writing and updating user data in the system.
AccountLog
The type Account log use to generate Log and safe to specific file
AccountModifier
The type Account modifier.
AccountVisualizationFrame
A JFrame subclass that visualizes account data over a series of years.
addKidTest
The type Add kid test.
BackgroundPanel
The BackgroundPanel class extends JPanel to create a panel that displays a background image.
CreateAccountHandler
The BackgroundPanel class extends JPanel to create a panel that displays a background image.
CreateAccountPage
The CreateAccountPage class extends Page to provide functionality for creating new bank accounts.
CreateGoalHandler
Handles the creation of financial goals for a user's account.
createTaskHandler
Handles the action of creating a new task from the user interface.
CreateTaskPage
The CreateTaskPage class extends Page and is used to provide the interface for creating new tasks within the application.
CurrentAccount
Represents a current account type in a banking system.
deliverTaskHandler
Handles the action of delivering tasks through the user interface.
DeliverTaskPage
The CreateTaskPage class extends Page and is used to provide the interface for creating new tasks within the application.
DetailHandler
The type Detail handler.
DetailPage
Represents a detailed view page for a specific user's account.
exampleCreator
A utility class to create and manage examples of financial transactions for demonstration or testing purposes.
GetTaskHandler
Handles the retrieval of tasks through the user interface.
GetTaskPage
Represents a page where users can view and manage their tasks.
GoalHandler
The type Goal handler.
GoalPage
The type Goal page.
homeGUI
Represents the main home page GUI for users to interact with their account information.
homePageForKid
Represents the home page GUI for kid users, facilitating interactions with account information.
homePageForParent
Represents the home page GUI for parent users, facilitating interactions with account information and their children's accounts.
InterestPage
The type Interest page.
Kid
Represents a child user in a system where users may have different roles and attributes.
KidHomeHandler
Handles the transition to the homepage specifically designed for kids.
KidProfileHandler
Handles the action of transitioning to a profile page specifically designed for kids.
LoginCheck
The interface Login check.
LoginForm
If there is no selected button, you can return null or some other appropriate value.
LoginHandler
The LoginHandler class implements ActionListener to handle the login process in a login form.
Main
The Main class serves as the entry point for the application.
MainFrame
The MainFrame class extends JFrame to create a main application window that uses CardLayout to manage different panels.
ModifyHandler
Handles mouse interactions for modifying tasks through a graphical user interface.
ModifyPage
The ModifyPage class provides a user interface for modifying or deleting tasks.
NotificationHandler
Handles actions to manage notifications within the user interface.
NotificationPage
The type Notification page.
Page
The type Page.
Parent
Represents a parent user in a system where users may have roles such as managing other users (children).
ParentHomeHandler
Handles the action of transitioning to the homepage specifically designed for parents.
ParentProfileHandler
Handles the action of transitioning to the profile page specifically designed for parents.
ProfilePageForKid
The type Profile page for kid.
ProfilePageForParent
The type Profile page for parent.
SavingAccount
Represents a savings account with a fixed interest rate and term.
SetTaskHandler
Handles the action of transitioning from the current page to the set task page in a user interface.
SetTaskPage
The type Set task page.
SignUpForm
Constructs a new MainFrame, initializing the layout, setting the window's title, default close operation, size, and location.
SignUpHandler
// This is where the logic to switch back to the login screen is handled. // For example, you can create and display a login form instance
SubmitHandler
Handles mouse interactions for submitting tasks through a graphical user interface.
SubmitPage
The type Submit page.
Task
The Task class represents a task with an ID, name, status, and monetary value.
TaskLoader
The TaskLoader class is responsible for creating and initializing Task objects.
test
The test class serves as a testing environment for various methods and functionalities related to account and task management.
test
The test class contains the main method which serves as the entry point for the application.
User
Represents a generic user in the system.
